title: bubbleT operation
description: Bubble-point temperature at fixed pressure: find the T at which the first vapour bubble forms from a saturated liquid of the given composition.  Solved by Newton-1D in T on Sum_i K_i(T) x_i = 1.  Hardware-only: specify the pressure P; the bubble temperature is the RESULT.

P.title: Pressure
P.description: System pressure at which the bubble point is evaluated.
